exposes.name: config_led_top_left_press
exposes.label: LED config (top left short press)
exposes.description:
Specifies LED color (rgb) and pattern on short press as hex string.
0-2: RGB value (e.g. ffffff = white)
3: Light position (01=top, 02=bottom, 00=full)
4-7: Durations for sequence fade-in -> on -> fade-out -> off (e.g. 01020102)
8: Number of Repetitions (01=1 to ff=255)
Example: ff1493000104010001

exposes.name: external_measured_room_sensor
exposes.label: External measured room sensor
exposes.description: The temperature sensor of the TRV is — due to its design — relatively close to the heat source (i.e. the hot water in the radiator). Thus there are situations where the `local_temperature` measured by the TRV is not accurate enough: If the radiator is covered behind curtains or furniture, if the room is rather big, or if the radiator itself is big and the flow temperature is high, then the temperature in the room may easily diverge from the `local_temperature` measured by the TRV by 5°C to 8°C. In this case you might choose to use an external room sensor and send the measured value of the external room sensor to the `External_measured_room_sensor` property. The way the TRV operates on the `External_measured_room_sensor` depends on the setting of the `Radiator_covered` property: If `Radiator_covered` is `false` (Auto Offset Mode): You *must* set the `External_measured_room_sensor` property *at least* every 3 hours. After 3 hours the TRV disables this function and resets the value of the `External_measured_room_sensor` property to -8000 (disabled). You *should* set the `External_measured_room_sensor` property *at most* every 30 minutes or every 0.1°C change in measured room temperature. If `Radiator_covered` is `true` (Room Sensor Mode): You *must* set the `External_measured_room_sensor` property *at least* every 30 minutes. After 35 minutes the TRV disables this function and resets the value of the `External_measured_room_sensor` property to -8000 (disabled). You *should* set the `External_measured_room_sensor` property *at most* every 5 minutes or every 0.1°C change in measured room temperature. The unit of this value is 0.01 `°C` (so e.g. 21°C would be represented as 2100).

exposes.name: radiator_covered
exposes.label: Radiator covered
exposes.description: Controls whether the TRV should solely rely on an external room sensor or operate in offset mode. `false` = Auto Offset Mode (use this e.g. for exposed radiators) or `true` = Room Sensor Mode (use this e.g. for covered radiators). Please note that this flag only controls how the TRV operates on the value of `External_measured_room_sensor`; only setting this flag without setting the `External_measured_room_sensor` has no (noticeable?) effect.

exposes.name: trv_mode
exposes.label: Trv mode
exposes.description: Select between direct control of the valve via the `valve_position` or automatic control of the valve based on the `current_heating_setpoint`. For manual control set the value to 1, for automatic control set the value to 2 (the default). When switched to manual mode the display shows a value from 0 (valve closed) to 100 (valve fully open) and the buttons on the device are disabled.

exposes.name: valve_position
exposes.label: Valve position
exposes.description: Directly control the radiator valve when `trv_mode` is set to 1. The values range from 0 (valve closed) to 255 (valve fully open)

exposes.description: Mirror display of the thermostat. Useful when it is mounted in a way where the display is presented upside down.

features.description: Type of user, unrestricted: owner (default), (year|week)_day_schedule: user has ability to open lock based on specific time period, master: user has ability to both program and operate the door lock, non_access: user is recognized by the lock but does not have the ability to open the lock

features.name: pin_code
features.label: PIN code
features.description: Pincode to set, set pincode to null to clear

exposes.name: action_source_name
exposes.label: Action source name
exposes.description: Source of the triggered action on the lock

exposes.name: action_user
exposes.label: Action user
exposes.description: ID of user that triggered the action on the lock

exposes.name: auto_relock_time
exposes.label: Auto relock time
exposes.description: The number of seconds to wait after unlocking a lock before it automatically locks again. 0=disabled

exposes.name: sound_volume
exposes.label: Sound volume
exposes.description: Sound volume of the lock

exposes.name: battery_low
exposes.label: Battery low
exposes.description: Indicates if the battery of this device is almost empty

exposes.name: action
exposes.label: Action
exposes.description: Triggered action (e.g. a button click)

options.name: expose_pin
options.label: Expose PIN
options.description: Expose pin of this lock in the published payload (default false).
